name: subagents: review-node-boundaries and review-node-observability use different prompt_id values (separate prompt registry entries per P-1)
command: b=$(grep -E "^prompt_id:" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/review-node-boundaries.md" | awk '{print $2}'); o=$(grep -E "^prompt_id:" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/review-node-observability.md" | awk '{print $2}'); [ "$b" != "$o" ] && [ -n "$b" ] && [ -n "$o" ] && echo "ok b=$b o=$o" 1>&2
